payload.text: Frontend: React, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Java (Spring Boot), Node.js (Express), REST APIs
Core: OOP, DSA, Operating Systems, Computer Networks
Tech: Vite, JavaScript, React, shadcn-ui, Tailwind CSS
• Developed a modern healthcare web application to manage and display healthcare-related information.
• Built a responsive UI using React and Tailwind CSS improving user experience across devices.
• Used Vite for faster development builds and optimized frontend performance.
• Designed a clean layout compatible with both desktop and mobile devices.
Tech: Python, Flask, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch, ResNet, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Git
• Developed an AI-powered agriculture assistant to help farmers make data-driven decisions.
• Implemented a machine learning crop recommendation system based on soil nutrients and weather
• Built a deep learning plant disease detection system using a ResNet model to classify plant diseases
• Processed agricultural datasets using NumPy and Pandas to improve prediction accuracy.
Software Development Engineer (SDE) Intern July 2025 – August 2025
• Assisted in developing and testing software components for financial technology applications.
• Worked with modern development tools and version control systems to manage code efficiently.
• Participated in debugging and optimizing code to improve system reliability and performance.
• Gained hands-on experience in real-world software development workflows and collaboration.
• Completed Software Development Engineer Internship gaining real-world fintech development
• Built and deployed multiple projects including Care Vision and Cropify AI Farming Assistant.
